title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Rising Conflict
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1, Moria, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen closely, and don't forget this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The power up lasts about 10 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get it? You only have 10 minutes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa, wait!! Going on would be...!! gya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We put all 100 shadows in him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just how strong is he right now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You were a little smaller before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'm aching to get into a fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you're our ray of hope, "Nightmare Luffy"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Wait! The mansion is the other way!!!
